message:
feat: add verbose/debug mode for troubleshooting (-v/--verbose)

- Add global -v/--verbose flag to Cli struct
- Add verbose() and verbose_hex() helper methods to SavantElite
- Add verbose output for:
  - HID API initialization and device enumeration
  - Key action parsing (modifiers and key codes)
  - USB device opening and interface claiming
  - Config file loading
  - Monitor mode HID reads and report normalization
- Verbose output goes to stderr, normal output to stdout
- Add 5 integration tests for verbose mode

Usage: savant -v info
       savant --verbose program --dry-run

Closes: savant_elite_rust-rav

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
